ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Erika Haraguchi appeared in person for and with Linda Montgomery (petitioner).

Ms. Harauguchi explained to the Court that she simply failed to appear. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Erika Miyuki Haraguchi Pursuant to CCP 177.5 payable within 10 days of the order. The Status on close of estate is continued to November 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Continued To Sep-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Linda Montgomery and the Attorney Erika M. Haraguchi to appear on September 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed.

An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for counsel to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to September 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K, Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 10, 2020 is admitted to probate. Linda Montgomery is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
